title: Configured Feature Saplings Forgified
body:
Forge port of [Configured Feature Saplings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured-feature-saplings).

Mod that fixes bug where you couldnt change what saplings/mushrooms grow into (https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-251744). Allows datapacks to edit features in the `worldgen/configured_features` folder.
